titleStmt.title: SII 17.602: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 602. (A.R. No. 557 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
Rājēndra III. Year 13: 1259 A.D. Year 20: 1265-66 A.D. Year 23: 1268-69 A.D.

This inscription records three grants on different dates in the reign of the same king. The details of date given for the first grant viz. year 13, Mīṉa ba. 3, Monday, Tiruvōṇam, are irregular as the combination is impossible.

The first grant is of three pieces of land, one in Paḷḷi and Mārāyamaṅgalam alias Rājādhirāja-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu and ano ther in Perumpōr, a dēvadāna and another in Rājanārāyaṇa-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a tiṟappu-vāḻ-kuḍi, the last made tax-free by the sabhā, of the same place for worship and other services to gods Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār and Poṟpatikkunāyaka-Īśvaramuḍaiyār, set up by them on the southern side of Rājākkaḷtambirāṉ-tiṟuvīdi Sannadhittiruvīdi in Śelva-ttiruvārūr by Śiṟunāṅgūruḍaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻaga-pperumāḷ alias Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ of Pāmbuṇi-kkūṟṟam in Śuttamali-vaḷanāḍu and Pirambaṉ Poṟpatikkunāyakaṉ Tiruviḍaimaruduḍaiyāṉ alias Vijayapālan of Ārkāṭṭukkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu (See No. 600 above). The latter made two grants in the 20th and 23rd regnal year of the same king, of two fields in his own land in Perumpōr, a dēvadāna in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, respectively for worship and other services to god TirumāḷigaiViṉāyaka-ppiḷḷaiyār and to god Subrahmaṇya-ppiḷḷaiyār, whose images were set up by himself.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ ḷa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājendracoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu mīṉanāyaṟṟuaparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ cutta malivaḷanāṭṭu pāmpuṇikkūṟṟattu ciṟu nāṅkūruṭai
yāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻakap perumāḷāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyaṉum pāṇṭikularacaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu pirampaṉ poṟpatikkunāyakaṉ tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉāṉa vicaiyapālaṉum Iv viruvom celvattiruvāru(r)ril rājākkaḷtam
pirāṉ tiruviti saṉṉatittiruvitiyil teṉpakkattu nāṅkaḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkkum Uṭaiyār poṟpatikku nāyaka Īśvaramuṭai yārkkum pūjaikkum nivantam peṟuvārkkum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum Uṭalāka nā
ṅkaḷ pala Ūrkaḷilum vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭa keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu tevatāṉam paḷḷiyu mārāyamaṅkalamumāṉa rācātirācaccaruppetimaṅkalattu nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāṇiyum tevatāṉam perumporil nilam
mukkāle nālumākkāṇiyum tiṟappu vāḻkuṭiyāṉa Irācanārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu vilai koṇṭu Ivvūr sabhaiyār Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyiliceytu tantanilam mukkāle nālumākkāṇi yum Āka viḷai nilam muṉṟe
mukkāle nālumākkāṇiyum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭuttom kaḷappāḷarāyaṉum vicaiya pālaṉum Ivviruvom Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟunāṅkūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻakapperu māḷāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
vicaiyapālaṉ Eḻuttu: . Ikkoyilil Irupatāvatu pirampaṉ poṟpatikku nāyakaṉ tiru viṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉāṉa vicaiyapālaṉeṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta tirumāḷikai viṉāyakappiḷḷai yārkku pūcaikkum nivantam peṟu
vārkkum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Uṭalākat tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṉ viṭṭa keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tevatāṉam perumporil Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu pukaippoti Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattu viḷainilam Araiyum
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭutteṉ pirampaṉ poṟpatikku nāyakaṉ tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉāṉa vicaiyapālaṉ Eḻuttu: . Ikkoyilil 2 10 2 vatu Ivar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta subram maṇṇiyappiḷḷaiyārkku pūjaikkum nivantam peṟuvārkkum Uṭalāka Intap perum porilum perumpor brammadeyattilu
m Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṉ Eḻutikkuṭutta cātaṉappaṭi taṭipalavāl � va�tma�kiḻakku nta�m 2 10 3 vatu piṉṉāṉi māta mutal tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākak kuṭutteṉ pirampaṉ vicaiyapālaṉeṉ Eḻuttu: ....
Digital edition of SII 17.602 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
